name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in half at the joints.
2. Heat oil to 360°F in a large frying pan or skillet.
3. Add the wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
4. To bake: Preheat oven to 450°F. Spread wings on a baking sheet in one layer and bake for 45 minutes.
5. Make sauce: Combine hot sauce or Tabasco with melted butter. Mix well.
6. When wings are cooked, pour sauce over them and serve immediately.
Serves 2-6
Nathalie Dupree's "New Southern Cooking"
